name: ultipowers
description: Superpowers workflow discipline augmented with MCP-aware code navigation and implementation guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Superpowers workflows with mem0 and Serena routing for code-aware agents
interface.longDescription: Use Ultipowers MCP Augment to guide agent work through Superpowers-style brainstorming, implementation planning, TDD, debugging, execution, review, and finish-the-branch workflows while routing codebase discovery and edits through mem0 architecture context and Serena symbol tools when available.
defaultPrompt: I've got an idea for something I'd like to build.
Let's add a feature using mem0 and Serena context.
